articles.title: Live: ASX rises as oil prices hit five-week high, Wall Street tech stocks rebound
articles.description: The Australian share market has started its day higher after Wall Street's beaten-down tech and semiconductor stocks rebounded sharply overnight. Oil prices surged to a five-week high as Donald Trump signalled the US is "not finished" attacking Iran. Follow live.

articles.title: The real oil shock from the Iran war might be just beginning
articles.description: The opening of a second front in the war in the Middle East and depleted stocks of oil and refined products around the globe have left the world vulnerable, and oil prices are spiking.

articles.title: Rural suburb flagged as home for proposed $40b 'hyperscale' data centre
articles.description: A proposed massive new data centre would require more than six times the total demand of the Darwin and Katherine electricity grids to operate and be powered by gas piped direct from the Northern Territory's Beetaloo Basin.

articles.description: A Victorian magistrate has struck out a drink spiking charge against Melbourne socialite Amy Tossoun.

articles.title: $16 million mansion set for demolition catches fire twice in a night

articles.title: NT to become last jurisdiction to legalise voluntary assisted dying

articles.title: This optical illusion is rarer than a rainbow and tricky to see in Australia. So what actually is a fogbow?

articles.title: Crypto casino billionaire’s father’s mansion burns down in ‘suspicious’ fire
articles.description: A $16 million Coffs Harbour trophy home owned by the father of crypto casino mogul Ed Craven burned down in a fire described by police as "suspicious".

articles.title: Network 10 moves 10 News+ from weekdays
articles.description: Network 10 says its 10 News+ news and current affairs program is moving from its nightly weekday slot and will be aired on Sunday nights only.

articles.title: Qld government denies blocking report into response to domestic violence
articles.description: The report was particularly critical of police responses to domestic and family violence incidents, and highlighted a system "marked by fragmentation, inconsistency, and significant procedural and cultural barriers".
